name: auth-dashboard
description: Full-stack app with authentication and a protected dashboard
productSnippet: Authenticated dashboard: sign-in, protected dashboard, user-scoped data. Core features: auth, dashboard layout, at least one data view.

architectureHints.systemStyle: Modular Monolith — auth and feature domains as separate modules
architectureHints.codeOrganisation: Layered with clear auth boundary: public routes vs protected routes
architectureHints.dataPattern: Repository pattern — UserRepository, plus one repo per feature domain
architectureHints.apiStyle: REST — /auth/* for auth flows, /api/v1/* for feature endpoints
architectureHints.frontendState: Server components for data, Zustand or Context for UI state (sidebar, theme)
architectureHints.errorStrategy: JWT validation middleware, 401 for missing token, 403 for insufficient role

commonPatterns: JWT access token + refresh token rotation
Protected route layout group in Next.js App Router
securityNotes: Store JWT secret in env — never in code
Set httpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Strict on auth cookies
Refresh tokens must be rotated on every use
quickStartPrompts: Build a dashboard with login for managing team tasks
Build a SaaS app with email login and a user dashboard
Build an internal tool with role-based access
